mission.title: tikv: Make general cargo command work
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: koushiro <koushiro.cqx@gmail.com>

###  What have you changed?

* Make general cargo command work by adding default features for some crates in components. (e.g. run `cargo check` in `components/tikv_util`)
* Remove some useless dependencies of some crates.

###  What is the type of the changes?

- Misc (other changes)

###  How is the PR tested?

- Manual test

###  Does this PR affect documentation (docs) or should it be mentioned in the release notes?

No

###  Does this PR affect `tidb-ansible`?

No

###  Refer to a related PR or issue link (optional)

Close #6145

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
cargo build -p engine
#or
cargo build -p engine --no-default-features --features prost-codec

cd components/engine
cargo build --features protobuf-codec
#or
cd components/engine
cargo build --features prost-codec
